# Chapter 18: Modern AI: deep learning, transformers, LLMs  (~110 pp)
- 18.1 Neural networks: from perceptron to MLP (15) · 18.2 Backpropagation (12) · 18.3 Convolutional and recurrent architectures (15) · 18.4 Attention and the transformer (18) · 18.5 Pretraining, fine-tuning, RLHF (15) · 18.6 LLMs: capabilities and limits engineering-first (15) · 18.7 Multimodal models (10) · 18.8 Failure section: hallucination, jailbreaks, distributional cliffs, evaluation games, current as of 2026 (10)

**Archetype**: scaling, optimisation, ethics, failure. **Project**: fine-tune a small open model on a domain task; evaluate properly. **Exercises**: 25.
